ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty (e.g., Acute Care, Family Health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the specialty (e.g., medical, nursing, allied health) */,
  "certification_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether certification is required for the specialty */,
  "education_required" TEXT /* Education required for the specialty (e.g., bachelor's degree, master's degree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or country */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or country */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the state belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state or country */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the state or country */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the state or country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty the professional belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or country where the professional is licensed */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare professional */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the healthcare professional */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the healthcare professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_professionals_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_professionals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hcp_specialties" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the healthcare professional was certified in the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id", "specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or country */,
  "new_york_state" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare professionals in New York State */,
  "other_us" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare professionals in other US states */,
  "foreign" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare professionals in foreign countries */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of healthcare professionals */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of healthcare professionals in the specialty and state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or country */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Statistic included in the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "specialty_id", "state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "vis_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "visualization_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to generate the visualization (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the visualization should be displayed in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id", "report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data visualization */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the visualization should be displayed on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id", "vis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
